items.name: Tibetan Happy Plate
items.description: 4x Momos, 2x Shapales, 2pcs Gyuma & Egg Fried Rice.

items.name: Stir Fry Noodle
items.description: Angel hair noodle, julienned carrot, wombok, pakchoy, capsicum, onion served with your choice of chilli level.

items.name: Cold Noodle
items.description: Noodle, fried pakchoy, zucchini, wombok, capsicum, tomato served with house-made chilli sauce.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Chef's special seasoned & steamed rice, fresh diced veggie, free range egg, served with house made chilli.

items.name: Handmade Gyuma
items.description: Tibetan beef fried gyuma sausage made with handmade beef mince, onion, served with house-made sauces.

items.name: Tibetan Fried Beef Shapta
items.description: Fried beef with capsicum, onion & tomatoes.

items.name: Tibetan Fried Pork Shapta
items.description: Pork fried with capsicum, onion & tomatoes.

items.name: Fried Mokthuk (10pcs, handmade)
items.description: Mokthuk is a type of momo, dry or deep fried, with handmade zizi momo in your preference beef or chicken.

items.name: Poached Mokthuk (10pcs, handmade)
items.description: Handmade zizi momo in beef or chicken broth and green veges served with chilli sauce on the side.

items.name: Soup Mokthuk (10pcs, handmade)
items.description: Handmade zizi momo in beef or chicken broth and green veges served with chilli sauce on the side.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: Tibetan traditional noodle soup with broth, beef or chicken, green veges served with chilli sauce on the side.

items.name: Fried Thenthuk (handpulled noodle)
items.description: The famous hand pulled noodle common in Tibetan cuisine, broth, green veges, stir fried.

items.name: Vege Thenthuk (handpulled noodle)
items.description: The famous hand pulled noodle common in Tibetan cuisine, broth, green veges, served with chilli sauce.

items.name: Tibetan Shapaley (4pcs, handmade)
items.description: Authentic Tibetan meat pie, a popular street food of seasoned beef mince, wombok, onion, celery, wrapped in hand made dough and flattened, deep fried.
